stages.name: Environment Setup
stages.description: Create repository, install dependencies, clone code
actions: Create directory structure: mkdir -p src/ data/raw data/processed models/ configs/ results/
Install Python packages: pip install -r requirements.txt (torch transformers datasets sacrebleu etc.)
Download BLOOMZ-7B1-MT model from Hugging Face into models/bloomz-7b1-mt/
Download LLAMA3.1-8B-INSTRUCT model from Hugging Face into models/llama3.1-8b-instruct/ (if authorized)
Set environment variables for Hugging Face token and data paths in .env
Clone official code repository and copy any required external baselines (e.g., ITI, CAA) into external/

stages.name: Data Preparation
stages.description: Download and preprocess all required datasets
actions: Download News Commentary v16 (en-xx parallel) from WMT into data/raw/news_commentary/
Download CCAligned for all language pairs into data/raw/ccaligned/
Download Flores development set into data/raw/flores_dev/
Download XCOPA from Hugging Face datasets into data/raw/xcopa/
Download XStoryCloze from Hugging Face datasets into data/raw/xstorycloze/
Preprocess each dataset: tokenize, split into train/val/test, save as JSONL in data/processed/
Create a manifest CSV listing all processed files, language pairs, and splits

stages.name: Train Baselines
stages.description: Implement and train all baseline methods for comparison
actions: Create shared evaluation harness src/evaluation/evaluator.py with accuracy, EM, BLEU functions
Implement BASELINE: script src/baselines/baseline.py that runs original model without intervention
Implement MT-GOOGLE: script src/baselines/mt_google.py that calls Google Translate API then feeds English to LLM
Implement MT-LLM: script src/baselines/mt_llm.py that uses BLOOMZ-7B1-MT to translate inputs to English before LLM
Implement SFT: fine-tune BLOOMZ-7B1-MT on English XCOPA/XStoryCloze with LoRA via python train_sft.py --config configs/sft.yaml
Implement ITI: compute attention-head direction vectors for English shift, apply during inference in src/baselines/iti_intervene.py
Implement CAA: compute contrastive activation difference vectors, apply during inference in src/baselines/caa_intervene.py

stages.name: Train Proposed Method
stages.description: Implement and train the proposed method
actions: Write script src/data/sample_parallel.py to sample 500 parallel pairs per language, output data/alignment_samples.jsonl
Write script src/extract_hidden.py: run BLOOMZ-7B1-MT on each pair, save last-token hidden states for all layers to hidden_states.pt
Write script src/compute_alignment.py: load hidden_states.pt, compute W_l via least squares per layer, save alignment_matrices.pt
Implement src/intervention.py: class that loads alignment matrices and applies h_mix = h_s + α (W_l h_s) at each layer
Integrate intervention into generation: modify model forward in src/generate_with_intervention.py to replace hidden states during decoding
Write script src/tune_alpha.py: grid search α in [-1,1] on validation set per language, save best_alpha.json
Execute full setup pipeline: bash run_incline_setup.sh (sample, extract, compute alignment, tune alpha)

stages.name: Evaluation
stages.description: Run evaluation on all experiments and compute metrics
actions: Run baseline evaluations: python src/evaluate.py --method baseline --tasks xcopa,xstorycloze,mzsre,flores,wmt23,mgsm
Run all other baseline evaluations (MT-GOOGLE, MT-LLM, SFT, ITI, CAA) with respective configs
Run INCLINE evaluation: python src/evaluate.py --method incline --alignment alignment_matrices.pt --alphas best_alpha.json
Compute accuracy for XCOPA, XStoryCloze, XWinograd using sklearn.metrics.accuracy_score
Compute exact match (EM) for MZsRE by string matching predicted and ground truth answers
Compute BLEU for Flores and WMT23 using sacrebleu
Aggregate all results into summary CSV and LaTeX tables with scripts/aggregate_results.py
Generate comparison plots per task using scripts/plot_results.py, save in results/plots/

stages.name: Final Verification
stages.description: Compare reproduced results against paper claims
actions: Load paper's reported metrics from paper_claims.json into a comparison dataframe
Compute relative differences for each method and metric: (reproduced - reported) / reported
Check whether differences lie within acceptable tolerance (±5%)
Generate verification report verification_report.md documenting agreement or discrepancies
If discrepancies exist, list potential causes (data splits, model versions, hyperparameter differences)
Archive all raw results, logs, and the verification report in final_verification/
